parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM interview_slots
WHERE slot_date >= CURDATE() + INTERVAL {{ $node["Global Config"].json.slot_offset_days }} DAY
AND is_booked = 0
AND DAYOFWEEK(slot_date) NOT IN (1,7)
AND slot_date NOT IN (SELECT holiday_date FROM holidays)
ORDER BY slot_date, slot_time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(date_candidate) as next_working_day
FROM (
    SELECT DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq DAY) as date_candidate
    FROM (
        SELECT 1 seq UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION 
        SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION 
        SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10
    ) numbers
) d
WHERE DAYOFWEEK(date_candidate) NOT IN (1,7)
AND date_candidate NOT IN (SELECT holiday_date FROM holidays)
AND date_candidate > (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(slot_date), CURDATE())
    FROM interview_slots
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO interview_slots (slot_date, slot_time)
SELECT 
    '{{ $json.next_working_day }}',
    t.slot_time
FROM 
(
    SELECT '10:00:00' as slot_time UNION
    SELECT '11:00:00' UNION
    SELECT '12:00:00' UNION
    SELECT '14:00:00' UNION
    SELECT '15:00:00' UNION
    SELECT '16:00:00'
) t;

SELECT *
FROM interview_slots
WHERE slot_date >= CURDATE() + INTERVAL {{ $node["Global Config"].json.slot_offset_days }} DAY
AND is_booked = 0
AND DAYOFWEEK(slot_date) NOT IN (1,7)
AND slot_date NOT IN (SELECT holiday_date FROM holidays)
ORDER BY slot_date, slot_time
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM interview_slots
WHERE slot_date > CURDATE()
AND is_booked = 1
AND candidate_email = '{{ $('Evaluate Candidate Match').item.json.candidate_email }}'  ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.subject: Interview Invitation
Interview Slot Already Scheduled
parameters.message:
= Interview Slot Already Scheduled

Interview Slot Already Scheduled

Dear {{ $('Extract & Parse AI Response').item.json.candidate_name }},

Thank you for your continued interest in the Software Developer position.

We would like to inform you that your interview slot has already been successfully scheduled as per the details below:

Interview Date: {{ $json.slot_date }}
Interview Time: {{ $json.slot_time }}

If you have already received the confirmation email, please consider this as a reminder.

If you need to reschedule due to unavoidable circumstances, kindly reply to this email.

We look forward to speaking with you.


Best regards,
{{ $node["Global Config"].json.email_signature_name }}
{{ $node["Global Config"].json.email_signature_company }}

This is an automated email. Please do not reply unless necessary.

parameters.subject: Resume Format Issue - Please Resubmit
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.from.value[0]?.name || 'Candidate' }},

Thank you for your interest in applying with us.

We noticed that the attachment you provided is not in the required resume format.

To proceed with your application, please ensure your resume is submitted in the following format:

  • PDF (.pdf)

Kindly resend your application with the correct attachment format so we can review your profile.

If you have already submitted the correct file, please ignore this message.


Best regards,
{{ $node["Global Config"].json.email_signature_name }}
{{ $node["Global Config"].json.email_signature_company }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE interview_slots
SET is_booked = 1,
    candidate_email = '{{ $('Evaluate Candidate Match').item.json.candidate_email }}'
WHERE id = {{ $json.id }};
